sizing_rule.note: Geometric progression sizing (1→2 contracts) triggered when arithmetic mean trade size exceeds 2× geometric mean. Constrains fractional trading. Author (Vince) does not specify optimal_f value explicitly.

source_rule_text: Use geometric progression to advance from 1 contract to 2 contracts only when the arithmetic average trade is more than twice the size of the geometric average trade and when you cannot trade fractional units.
